execute_another_child_workflow_and_map_v: Execute another child workflow and map variables to its Start trigger schema. Helps with modularizing workflows.
execute_another_workflow_and_map_variabl: Execute another workflow and map variables to its Start trigger schema.
map_fields_defined_in_the_child_workflow: Map fields defined in the child workflow's Start block to variables/values in this workflow.
mapping_of_input_fields_to_values: Mapping of input fields to values
